title: settlement.blueprint.json + model-check the money (M4)
deliverable: encode the full settlement lifecycle (incl. CANCELLED + escrow-expiry); safety: escrow empties, no settle without dual-sig, no double-settle; liveness: ◇terminal under fairness with expiry timer

acceptance.money_mutants_fail: remove expiry timer / settle-before-validate / double-settle each caught
